word: H7158 - קִרְיַת סַנָּה - Qiryath Çannâh - keer-yath' san-naw' - Kirjath-sannah

sections.paragraph:
Original: קרית ספר קרית סנּה

Transliteration: qiryath sannâh qiryath sêpher

Phonetic: keer-yath' san-naw'

BDB Definition:

Kirjath-sepher or Kirjath-sannah = "city of the book"
  1. a town in the mountains of Judah to the west of Hebron

Origin: from H7151 and a simpler fem. from the same as H5577, or (for the latter name) H5612

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Neuter
